word: G4683 - σπαργανόω - sparganóō - spar-gan-o'-o - Wrap in swaddling clothes

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Wrap in swaddling clothes
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From σπάργανον sparganon (a strip; from a derivative of the base of G4682 meaning to strap or wrap with strips); to swathe (an infant after the Oriental custom): - wrap in swaddling clothes.
